caption:
Testing a stop motion idea for @Discover #DiscoverPartner. I wondered if we could make the illusion of a ‘stretchy’ card by creating a bunch prop cards

Shoutout @itsjakeberg for help with the prop design!
firstComment: This is a scam card. Actually. I was scammed by one of those mall kiosk places that didn’t bait and switch and instead of investigating it and refunding my $325, discover sided with the scammers and reframed my complains as just a case of “dissatisfaction in the quality of the product. Buyer be very aware Discover does not take their clients/customers concerns into any consideration. I’ve been fighting this and going back and forth with discover for months, since August. And they dig their heels in as if they would fold if they didn’t make sure they followed the law and protected their customers. Discover does not have your back, proceed with this company with extreme caution.
